description: 4x unroll S2C descriptor refill loop with hoisted buf_size

suggestions: Inspect l1d_miss_rate and l3_miss — high values indicate working set exceeds cache.
Check for unaligned memory accesses (expensive on POWER).
Verify VSX/AltiVec SIMD paths are used in hot loops rather than scalar fallbacks.
Look for division or modulo in hot paths — replace with shifts/masks where possible.
Check for false sharing on shared data structures (128B cache lines on POWER).
